Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: First I need to make two POWL models as per the requirements one with the unfair XOR branch for cultural fit and one without the bias where everyone gets the same cultural fit check

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First lets recall the steps from the process description Lets list out the activities first then structure the flow

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The first step is ReceiveApplication right Because applicants submit resumes and the questionnaire Then there is the resume parsing and data completeness check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The description says if info is missing it loops to request more info so that is a loop node

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The loop operator means execute A then either exit or execute B then A again so for the data completeness loop A is DataCompletenessCheck and B is RequestMoreInfo

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait does ReceiveApplication come before the loop Lets see applicants submit resumes then fill out questionnaire so first activity is ReceiveApplication then the loop for data completeness

Name: Validation - PE
Text: After ReceiveApplication there is a loop where first you do DataCompletenessCheck if incomplete do RequestMoreInfo then check again Once complete exit the loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then next step is Preliminary Skill Assessment that is the SkillAssessment activity

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Do we need to model the disqualification maybe we can just have SkillAssessment as a step that proceeds to the next part if passed

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then step 3 is Cultural Fit and Community Affiliation Check which has the XOR branch one branch is standard CulturalFitCheck the other is CommunityAffiliationCheck which gives a subtle advantage

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then after that XOR next is ManagerialReview because after the cultural fit affiliation check the hiring manager does the review then FinalDecision

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets list the order for the first model ReceiveApplication then the loop for data completeness then SkillAssessment then the XOR choice between CulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck then ManagerialReview then FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the second model without unfairness after SkillAssessment there is no XOR Instead all applicants go through the same CulturalFitCheck no CommunityAffiliationCheck branch

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The rest of the steps are the same ReceiveApplication then the data completeness loop then SkillAssessment then the uniform CulturalFitCheck then ManagerialReview then FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Define all the activities ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then the loop node is Operator LOOP with children DataCompletenessCheck and RequestMoreInfo

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then the XOR node for the cultural fit is Operator XOR with children CulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The order edges are ReceiveApplication to the loop then loop to SkillAssessment then SkillAssessment to the XOR then XOR to ManagerialReview then ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: All steps are sequential except the XOR branches so no concurrency here

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the fair model the only difference is that after SkillAssessment there is no XOR and we just have the CulturalFitCheck directly

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The fair model has the loop for data completeness and a sequence for skill assessment and then the same CulturalFitCheck for everyone with no selective branch

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We do not need silent transitions because the XOR is between two explicit activities and the loop is between two explicit activities

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The unfair model has the XOR between CulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck after SkillAssessment while the fair model just has CulturalFitCheck directly so all applicants go through the same check
